heroHeading: Get answers and transform your life
heroSubtext: Discover the missing piece to achieving lasting change, and the life you deserve
sectionSubtext: There comes a time in life when you find yourself on a challenging path, but can't find a clear way through.

perhapsItems.text: At a crossroads, struggling to make a decision
Experiencing a big life change, like becoming a parent, or a house move
In a relationship dynamic that no longer serves you
Fed up of being the supporting role in everyone else's life
Bored of putting your own goals on pause, but struggling to make progress

bannerQuote: You're done going through the motions — it's time to get answers.
outcomesSectionHeading: By the end of the programme, you will…
outcomes: Get clear on your values and what truly matters to you
Make confident decisions aligned with your authentic self
Break through the mental blocks holding you back
Build the courage to take action towards your goals
Develop lasting habits and a growth mindset
Step into the next chapter of your life with clarity
ctaSectionSubtext: Book a free Clarity Call and let's explore if this programme is the right fit for you.
